aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Unfiltered intensity

💼 Career: Tum jaldi react karoge aur unnecessary conflict create ho sakta hai

❤️ Love: Ego clash misunderstanding badha sakta hai

💰 Money: Emotional spending avoid karo

🧘 Advice: React nahi, respond karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tumhara biggest enemy tumhara impatience hai
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Quiet strength

💼 Career: Consistency tumhe ek stable advantage degi

❤️ Love: Emotional security strong feel hogi

💰 Money: Financial planning successful rahegi

🧘 Advice: Apni pace maintain rakho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tumhara slow approach hi tumhari real power hai
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: Hyperactive thoughts

💼 Career: Distraction productivity ko weak karega

❤️ Love: Clear communication ki zarurat hogi

💰 Money: Random expenses control karo

🧘 Advice: Mind ko simplify karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum excitement me direction lose kar dete ho
cancer:
♋ Cancer

💼 Career: Tumhari intuition ek important issue solve karegi

❤️ Love: Emotional honesty bond strong karegi

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum pehle feel karte ho, baad me samajhte ho

♌ Leo

♎ Libra
